user_query: I'm planning a surprise anniversary party for my parents and I want to make it memorable. Can you suggest some hobbies that they can enjoy together? Also, I need some wisdom quotes about love to include in the party decorations. Lastly, I want to calculate the love compatibility between them. Can you provide me with their match percentage?

TaskList.description: Gather suggestions for hobbies that the parents can enjoy together.
Collect quotes about love for party decorations.
Calculate the love compatibility match percentage between the parents.
